understanding.goal_understanding: Navigate each level’s grid to complete all goal cells. A goal can only be completed by stepping onto its tile when the carried piece’s shape, color, and rotation exactly match that goal’s required attributes; finishing all goals advances to the next level, and finishing all levels wins.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each move (N/S/E/W) costs 1 stamina; when stamina reaches 0 you lose 1 life and stamina resets to max, and losing all lives ends the game. Walls block movement; the state provides blocked_directions and attempting a blocked direction wastes the move (no position change) while still spending stamina. Special modifier tiles alter the carried piece: shape changers cycle shape IDs 0–5 (wrap), color changers cycle colors in order orange → blue → green → red → orange, and rotation changers rotate 90° clockwise (0°→90°→180°→270°→0°). Goals only activate when all three attributes match simultaneously; stepping onto an activated goal completes it. Stamina-refill tiles restore stamina, and efficient routing around walls/modifiers is required due to limited turns.

A goal can only be completed by stepping onto its tile when the carried piece’s shape, color, and rotation exactly match that goal’s required attributes; finishing all goals advances to the next level, and finishing all levels wins.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each move (N/S/E/W) costs 1 stamina; when stamina reaches 0 you lose 1 life and stamina resets to max, and losing all lives ends the game. Walls block movement; the state provides blocked_directions and attempting a blocked direction wastes the move (no position change) while still spending stamina. Special modifier tiles alter the carried piece: shape changers cycle shape IDs 0–5 (wrap), color changers cycle colors in order orange → blue → green → red → orange, and rotation changers rotate 90° clockwise (0°→90°→180°→270°→0°). Goals only activate when all three attributes match simultaneously; stepping onto an activated goal completes it. Stamina-refill tiles restore stamina, and efficient routing around walls/modifiers is required due to limited turns.
